code: import{useEffect,useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{Col,Row}from'react-bootstrap';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Home(){const[category,setCategory]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{axios.get('http://localhost:9999/Category').then(res=>setCategory(res.data)).catch(err=>console.error(err));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Row,{className:"category-wrap mt-3 g-0",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Col,{className:"category-panel",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Row,{className:"g-3",children:category.map(item=>{const logoPath=`/${item.Logo.replace(/^images\//i,'images/')}`;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Col,{xs:6,sm:4,md:2,className:"text-center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"logo-circle mx-auto",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:logoPath,alt:item.Category_Name,className:"category-logo"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"logo-name",children:item.Category_Name})]},item.id);})})})});}export default Home;
